fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code to identify this payment method.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a text that describes the payment method.

fields.name: Bal. Account Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of account that a balancing entry is posted to, such as BANK for a cash account.

fields.name: Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the general ledger, customer, vendor, or bank account that the balancing entry of a posted sales or purchase document is posted to, such as a cash account for cash purchases. Please note Payment Method is not considered when creating document entries through journals.

fields.name: Direct Debit
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the payment method is used for direct debit collection.

fields.name: Direct Debit Pmt. Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the payment terms that will be used when the payment method is used for direct debit collection.

fields.name: Pmt. Export Line Definition
fields.tooltip: Specifies the data exchange definition in the Data Exchange Framework that is used to export payments.
